flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Universidad Politecnica de Puerto Rico vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.8k vs 5.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Universidad Politecnica de Puerto Rico rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $9.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Universidad Politecnica de Puerto Rico rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $9.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Universidad Politecnica de Puerto Rico rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.1k → $22.6k).
